name: sphinxcontrib-video

metadata.name: sphinxcontrib-video
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Allows embedding of HTML5 videos in sphinx

documentation:
# sphinxcontrib-video

```{image} https://img.shields.io/codecov/c/github/sphinx-contrib/video?logo=codecov&logoColor=white
:alt: Codecov
:target: https://app.codecov.io/gh/sphinx-contrib/video
```

```{image} https://img.shields.io/github/actions/workflow/status/sphinx-contrib/video/unit.yaml?logo=github&logoColor=white
:alt: GitHub Workflow Status
:target: https://github.com/sphinx-contrib/video/actions/workflows/unit.yaml
```

The video extension allows you to embed `.mp4`/`.webm`/`.ogg` videos as defined by the HTML5 standard. It's a wrapper around the `<video>` tag. using a simple directive as:

```rst
.. video:: movie.mp4
```

will be rendered as:

```html
<video>
   <source src="movie.mp4" type="video/mp4">
</video>
```

The extension exposes pretty much all parameters from the HTML5 `<video/>` tag.

More information about installation and usage in our [documentation quickstart](https://sphinxcontrib-video.readthedocs.io/en/latest/quickstart.html).

modules.name: sphinxcontrib.video
documentation: Video extention to embed video in a html sphinx output.

functions.name: sphinxcontrib.video.get_video
documentation:
Return video and suffix.

Load the video to the static directory if necessary and process the suffix. Raise a warning if not supported but do not stop the computation.

Args:
    src: The source of the video file (can be local or url)
    env: the build environment

Returns:
    The src file, the extension suffix, whether the file is remote

documentation: Exit of the html video node.

documentation: Entry point of the ignored video node.

Video directive.

classes.name: sphinxcontrib.video.VideoPostTransform

methods.name: sphinxcontrib.video.VideoPostTransform.run
documentation:
Add video files to Builder's image tracking.

Doing so ensures that the builder copies the files to the output directory.

Ensure video files are copied to build directory.

This copies what is done for images in the post_process_image method of
sphinx.builders.Builder, except as a Transform since we can't hook into that method
directly.
